hero.titleHighlight: The future of learning starts here
hero.description: A decentralized university platform powered by blockchain tokens and DAO governance. Build a trustworthy, transparent learning ecosystem where students and educators grow together.

platformAdvantages.title: Why learners choose us
platformAdvantages.subtitle: Blend blockchain technology with education innovation to unlock a new decentralized learning experience

tokenIncentive.title: Token incentives
tokenIncentive.description: Earn YD tokens while learning, share revenue while teaching—all fully transparent

blockchainCertificate.title: On-chain credentials
blockchainCertificate.description: Generate NFT certificates automatically and store them permanently on-chain for global recognition

daoGovernance.title: DAO governance
daoGovernance.description: Participate in community-led decisions and dispute resolution—every voice counts

featuredCourses.title: Featured courses
featuredCourses.subtitle: Premium classes from top instructors to help you step into Web3 fast

instructorInvitation.badge: Teach with us and unlock rewards
instructorInvitation.title: Share knowledge, capture value
instructorInvitation.description: Join the Web3 University faculty and enjoy fair, transparent revenue powered by blockchain. Publish a course to earn 10 YD instantly and keep 85% of every sale.

revenueShare.title: 85% revenue share
revenueShare.description: Receive 85% of every sale automatically, with full on-chain transparency

tokenRewards.title: Token rewards
tokenRewards.description: Earn extra tokens when learners finish, review, and recommend your courses

globalReach.title: Reach 50,000+ learners
globalReach.description: Access a global audience and build your reputation without borders

tokenExchange.title: Token exchange hub
tokenExchange.subtitle: Swap YD tokens instantly to purchase courses and fuel your Web3 journey
tokenExchange.introDescription: Use testnet ETH to convert into YD tokens for courses, credentials and governance. Production mainnet support is coming soon.
